tools.name: save_data
tools.description: A tool which allows you to save data to a named table for later use in visualizations.

name.description: The name of the table to save the data to

items.description: Row of the table as a dictionary/object

tools.name: visualize_data
tools.description: A tool which allows you to produce a data visualization using the Vega-Lite grammar.

data_name.description: The name of the data table to visualize

vegalite_specification.description: The vegalite v5 specification for the visualization. Do not include the data field, as this will be added automatically.
